name: MDH - Main (CIB)
description: Enhance the extracted data with details from your master records.

queries.//: Memorized value recalled by exact matching of name and/or address
Exact match of TAX ID with primary-address.vat-number (with normalization)
Fuzzy match on Name - score normalization, thresholds: 0.95, 0.93, 0.9, 0.85, 0.8, 0.75, 0.65, 0.6
Exact match on Primary Address Name
Fuzzy match on Primary address Name
Fuzzy match on Name and Address
Return all entities when nothing was found.
Memorized value recalled by exact matching of name and/or address
Exact match of TAX ID with primary-address.vat-number (with normalization)
Fuzzy match on Name - score normalization, thresholds: 0.95, 0.93, 0.9, 0.85, 0.8, 0.75, 0.65, 0.6
Fuzzy match on Name and Address
Fuzzy match on description - score normalization: greater than 0.9
Fuzzy match on description - score normalization, thresholds: 0.9

configurations.name: 8. Customer Ship-To Address - PO or Document data

guide:
To manage and configure the behavior, use our configurator below.

Start by

  • Selecting the queues that you want to use for this extension below

Then open Master Data Hub and

  • Import the dataset with Dataset Management
  • Create and set up a new configuration in Configurator

For more information, take a look at our documentation here.
